title: What a Supplier Questionnaire Must Ask
alt: Checklist of key sections a supplier quality questionnaire should cover

items.label: Licences & regulatory status
items.desc: Authorisations, GMP/GDP certificates, last inspection outcome

items.label: Quality management system
items.desc: ICH Q10: change control, deviations, CAPA, complaints, recalls

items.label: Data integrity & systems
items.desc: ALCOA+, audit trails, access controls, hybrid records

items.label: Outsourcing & supply chain
items.desc: Subcontracted activities and notification of changes

items.label: Evidence, not assertions
items.desc: Require SOP references, certificates and a reviewer verdict
